iv_roots.label: Spatial Form
iv_roots.description: Geometric, volumetric, and layout properties of architectural space.

iv_roots.label: Luminous Environment
iv_roots.description: Lighting: illuminance, CCT, daylight, circadian stimulus.

iv_roots.label: Thermal & Air Quality
iv_roots.description: Thermal comfort, air quality, ventilation, CO2/VOC/PM2.5.

iv_roots.label: Acoustic Environment
iv_roots.description: Noise level, reverberation, soundscape, speech intelligibility.

iv_roots.label: Nature & Biophilia
iv_roots.description: Plants, nature views, fractals, biophilic design features.

iv_roots.label: Material & Surface
iv_roots.description: Material type, surface texture, reflectance, natural vs. synthetic.

dv_roots.label: Cognition & Performance
dv_roots.description: Mental processes: attention, memory, executive function, learning, creativity.

dv_roots.label: Affect & Wellbeing
dv_roots.description: Emotional states: stress, restoration, mood, preference, comfort, satisfaction.

dv_roots.label: Physiology
dv_roots.description: Bodily responses: HRV, EDA, cortisol, respiration, HR, skin temperature.

dv_roots.label: Behavior
dv_roots.description: Observable actions: task performance, navigation, social behavior, movement.

dv_roots.label: Health Outcomes
dv_roots.description: Clinical health markers, chronic conditions, sleep quality, fatigue.

dv_roots.label: Mechanism / Pathway
dv_roots.description: Theoretical mediators, pathway descriptions, not a measured outcome.

notes: IV authority: Tagging_Contractor. Image tags are evidence_layer aliases, not IV roots.
DV authority: Outcome_Contractor. Provisional extensions carry parent_authority_node.
Acute HRV/EDA/cortisol/HR measures → affect.negative.stress or physio, NOT allostatic_load.
Topic node IDs are deterministic: {iv_root}__{dv_focus} with special-char sanitization.
A paper may appear in multiple topic nodes (multi-membership supported).
